## Recommended P8.2E target

- Add explicit distributed execution telemetry around Service Bus receive, SQL work-item execution, settlement, dead-letter, and retry paths.
- Keep settlement semantics inside `SqlServiceBusExecutorWorker`.
- Keep real execution delegated through `SqlOperationalServiceBusWorkItemExecutor` and `ISqlOperationalWorkItemExecutor`.
- Do not create a second execution-history mechanism; use the existing SQL operational execution-history path.
